name: password-auto-change-agent
description: Google Password Checkupで検出された漏洩パスワードを自動変更するエージェント

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none tests/core/csv-parser.test.mjs tests/core/password-generator.test.mjs tests/core/crypto-store.test.mjs tests/agent/orchestrator.test.mjs
scripts.test:watch: npm run build && node --test --watch --experimental-test-isolation=none tests/core/csv-parser.test.mjs tests/core/password-generator.test.mjs tests/core/crypto-store.test.mjs tests/agent/orchestrator.test.mjs
